betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6High Energy Field Jammer§f

§aEmergency suppression — prevents Fölkvangr field destruction within a 300-block radius!§f

The §bHigh Energy Field Jammer§f (hbm:field_disturber) is an emergency safety device that suppresses §bFölkvangr Fields§f within a §e300-block§f radius. While it cannot prevent the DFC core from being destroyed, it prevents the catastrophic area destruction that would otherwise follow.

§6Crafting§f:
Crafting Table recipe:
Starmetal Ingot + Versatile Circuit Board + Starmetal Ingot
Versatile Circuit Board + Alexandrite + Versatile Circuit Board
Starmetal Ingot + Versatile Circuit Board + Starmetal Ingot

§6Usage§f:
§b• Place within §e300 blocks§f of your DFC
§b• When a Fölkvangr field event occurs, the jammer suppresses it
§b• The DFC core will still be destroyed, but the surrounding area is spared
§b• Must be powered and active at all times during DFC operation

§cWarning§f: The jammer does NOT prevent the DFC meltdown itself — only the area destruction. You will still lose your DFC reactor if something goes wrong. It is a backup safety device, not a license to run unsafe operations!

§eTip§f: Install at least one High Energy Field Jammer before starting your DFC for the first time. Consider a second as backup. The recipe requires Starmetal, so ensure you have cyclotron production running.
